ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade flow record */,
  "reporter" TEXT /* Country or organization reporting the trade */,
  "trade_flow" TEXT /* Type of trade (Import/Export) */,
  "product_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the product being traded */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade */,
  "partner" TEXT /* Partner country involved in the trade */,
  "trade_value_usd" REAL /* Trade value in USD (thousands) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the product traded */,
  "quantity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "trade_flow_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade flow (confirmed, pending, rejected) */,
  "trade_flow_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade flow was recorded */,
  "trade_flow_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade data (e.g., customs, trade agreements) */,
  "trade_flow_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trade flow */,
  "trade_flow_validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the trade flow (validated, unvalidated) */,
  "trade_flow_validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade flow was last validated */,
  "trade_flow_validation_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who validated the trade flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flows_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES trade_years ("year_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flows_reporter FOREIGN KEY ("reporter") REFERENCES reporters ("reporter_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flows_partner FOREIGN KEY ("partner") REFERENCES partners ("partner_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flows_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flows_quantity_unit FOREIGN KEY ("quantity_unit") REFERENCES quantities ("quantity_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporter */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting country or organization */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the reporter */,
  "reporter_type" TEXT /* Type of the reporter (country, organization, etc.) */,
  "reporter_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the reporter */,
  "reporter_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "reporter_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "reporter_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the reporter */,
  "reporter_established_date" TEXT /* Date when the reporter entity was established */,
  "reporter_population" INTEGER /* Population of the reporter country (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" INTEGER /* Unique code assigned to each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the product */,
  "product_harvest_season" TEXT /* Typical harvest season for the product */,
  "product_packaging" TEXT /* Common packaging types for the product */,
  "product_quality_grade" TEXT /* Quality grade of the product */,
  "product_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications related to the product */,
  "product_allergens" TEXT /* Allergens present in the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner country */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the partner */,
  "partner_type" TEXT /* Type of the partner (country, organization, etc.) */,
  "partner_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the partner */,
  "partner_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "partner_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "partner_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the partner */,
  "partner_established_date" TEXT /* Date when the partner entity was established */,
  "partner_population" INTEGER /* Population of the partner country (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The year of trade data */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trade year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trade year */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the trade year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_value_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., 'USD', 'Euro') */,
  "conversion_to_usd" REAL /* Conversion factor to USD */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantities" (
  "quantity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantity unit */,
  "quantity_name" TEXT /* Name of the quantity unit (e.g., Kg, Liters) */,
  "quantity_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the quantity unit */,
  "quantity_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the quantity unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade flow record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES trade_flows ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_flow_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade flow the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., invoice, bill of lading) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL where the document is stored */,
  "document_uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flow_documents_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES trade_flows ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flow_documents_document_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("document_uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_flow_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade flow being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flow_audits_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES trade_flows ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_flow_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
